[org.apache.flink.runtime.messages](<org/apache/flink/runtime/messages/package-summary.html>)

This package contains the messages that are sent between Flink's distributed components to coordinate the distributed operations.

[org.apache.flink.runtime.messages.checkpoint](<org/apache/flink/runtime/messages/checkpoint/package-summary.html>)

This package contains the messages that are sent between [`JobMaster`](<org/apache/flink/runtime/jobmaster/JobMaster.html> "class in org.apache.flink.runtime.jobmaster") and [`TaskExecutor`](<org/apache/flink/runtime/taskexecutor/TaskExecutor.html> "class in org.apache.flink.runtime.taskexecutor") to coordinate the checkpoint snapshots of the distributed dataflow.

[org.apache.flink.runtime.messages.webmonitor](<org/apache/flink/runtime/messages/webmonitor/package-summary.html>)

This package contains the actor messages that are sent between the JobManager and components that are interested in the status of the JobManager.
